positive.zh: LangGraph StateGraph 通过 add_node、add_edge、compile 定义可复用编排规范。
positive.en: LangGraph StateGraph defines reusable orchestration specification via add_node, add_edge, and compile.
positive.ja: LangGraph StateGraph は add_node/add_edge/compile で reusable orchestration spec を定義。

boundary.zh: OpenAI Agents SDK 运行时对象与本规范边界区分，wire 状态不覆盖规范身份。
boundary.en: OpenAI Agents SDK runtime object is distinguished from this specification boundary; wire state does not overwrite spec identity.
boundary.ja: OpenAI Agents SDK runtime object と spec boundary を区別し wire state は spec identity を上書きしない。

counterexample.zh: A2A 协议 wire 对象缺少本概念要求的 identity 与规范字段，应拒绝分类。
counterexample.en: A2A protocol wire object lacks identity and specification fields required by this concept and should be rejected.
counterexample.ja: A2A wire object は identity/spec fields を欠如し分類を拒否すべき。

instance.zh: 真实产品 API 字段构成可运行时引用的完整实例。
instance.en: Real product API fields form a complete instance referenceable at runtime.
instance.ja: Real product API fields が runtime referenceable な complete instance を構成。

orchestration-task-planning|*|positive.zh: CrewAI Task/LangGraph StateGraph 映射 orchestration-task-planning 模块节点的可复用任务规划规范。
orchestration-task-planning|*|positive.en: CrewAI Task and LangGraph StateGraph map reusable task-planning specification for orchestration-task-planning nodes.
orchestration-task-planning|*|positive.ja: CrewAI Task/LangGraph StateGraph が orchestration-task-planning ノードの reusable task-planning spec を写像。

orchestration-task-planning|Task|positiv.zh: CrewAI 官方 research_task：description 要求对 AI Agents 做全面调研，expected_output 为 10 条要点列表，绑定 researcher Agent，不含运行状态。
orchestration-task-planning|Task|positiv.en: CrewAI official research_task: description requires thorough AI Agents research, expected_output is a 10-bullet list, bound to researcher Agent, with no runtime state.
orchestration-task-planning|Task|positiv.ja: CrewAI 公式 research_task：AI Agents 調査、expected_output 10 bullets、researcher Agent 割当、runtime state なし。

orchestration-task-planning|Task|boundar.zh: A2A SendMessage 返回 Task：status.state 从 TASK_STATE_SUBMITTED 经 TASK_STATE_WORKING 到 TASK_STATE_COMPLETED，含 history 与 artifact，映射 Execution 而非规划 Task。
orchestration-task-planning|Task|boundar.en: A2A SendMessage Task transitions TASK_STATE_SUBMITTED through WORKING to COMPLETED with history and artifact, mapping to Execution not planning Task.

orchestration-task-planning|Task|counter.zh: A2A wire Task 仅携带 TASK_STATE_WORKING 与 task id，没有 work_specification_id、desired_outcome 或 TaskCompletionCriterion 引用。
orchestration-task-planning|Task|counter.en: A2A wire Task carries only TASK_STATE_WORKING and task id without work_specification_id, desired_outcome, or TaskCompletionCriterion refs.
orchestration-task-planning|Task|counter.ja: A2A wire Task は TASK_STATE_WORKING と task id のみ。

orchestration-task-planning|TaskPlan|pos.zh: LangGraph StateGraph 编译：add_node(step_1, step_2, step_3) 与 add_edge(START, step_1, step_2, step_3, END)；TaskStep 对应节点、TaskDependency 对应边。
orchestration-task-planning|TaskPlan|pos.en: LangGraph StateGraph compile: add_node step_1/2/3 and add_edge START→step_1→step_2→step_3→END; TaskSteps map to nodes and TaskDependencies to edges.

orchestration-task-planning|TaskStep|pos.zh: LangGraph builder.add_node(generate_joke, fn) 定义单步：接受 state 字典、返回 state 更新，对应 TaskStep 位置与 I/O 契约。
orchestration-task-planning|TaskStep|pos.en: LangGraph builder.add_node(generate_joke, fn) defines one step accepting state dict and returning state update, matching TaskStep position and I/O contract.
orchestration-task-planning|TaskStep|pos.ja: LangGraph add_node(fn) が state 入出力契約を持つ TaskStep。

orchestration-task-planning|WorkItem|pos.zh: CrewAI report_crew.kickoff() 将 research_task 分配给 researcher、analysis_task 给 analyst，体现 WorkItem 式调度与 assignee 绑定。
orchestration-task-planning|WorkItem|pos.en: CrewAI report_crew.kickoff() assigns research_task to researcher and analysis_task to analyst with WorkItem-style scheduling and assignee binding.
orchestration-task-planning|WorkItem|pos.ja: CrewAI kickoff() が task→agent 割当で WorkItem scheduling。

orchestration-task-planning|TaskDependen.zh: LangGraph add_edge(step_1, step_2) 要求 step_1 完成后 step_2 才可启动，对应 TaskDependency 前置成功条件。
orchestration-task-planning|TaskDependen.en: LangGraph add_edge(step_1, step_2) requires step_1 completion before step_2 starts, matching TaskDependency predecessor condition.
orchestration-task-planning|TaskDependen.ja: LangGraph add_edge(step_1, step_2) が TaskDependency predecessor condition。

orchestration-task-planning|Goal|positiv.zh: CrewAI Agent(role=Researcher, goal=Conduct foundational research, backstory=...) 的 goal 字段声明方向性目标，尚未分解为 Task。
orchestration-task-planning|Goal|positiv.en: CrewAI Agent goal=Conduct foundational research declares directional Goal before Task decomposition.
orchestration-task-planning|Goal|positiv.ja: CrewAI Agent goal が Task 分解前の directional Goal。

orchestration-routing-control|*|positive.zh: LangGraph conditional_edges/Command 与 Semantic Router RouteLayer 映射 orchestration-routing-control 路由规范与决策。
orchestration-routing-control|*|positive.en: LangGraph conditional_edges/Command and Semantic Router RouteLayer map orchestration-routing-control routing specs and decisions.
orchestration-routing-control|*|positive.ja: LangGraph conditional_edges/Command + Semantic Router が routing spec/decision を写像。

orchestration-routing-control|Route|posi.zh: LangGraph classify 节点返回 Command(goto=billing_handler, update={category:billing}) 时，静态 Route 映射为 conditional_edges 表项 billing→billing_handler。
orchestration-routing-control|Route|posi.en: When LangGraph classify returns Command(goto=billing_handler, update={category:billing}), static Route maps to conditional_edges entry billing→billing_handler.
orchestration-routing-control|Route|posi.ja: LangGraph classify Command(goto=billing_handler) が static Route conditional_edges 表项。

orchestration-routing-control|Route|coun.zh: LangGraph 节点返回 Command(goto=billing_worker) 是运行时 RoutingDecision/SuccessorDispatch，不是带 source_control_ref 与 transfer_contract 的 Route 规范。
orchestration-routing-control|Route|coun.en: LangGraph Command(goto=billing_worker) is runtime RoutingDecision/SuccessorDispatch not Route spec with source_control_ref and transfer_contract.
orchestration-routing-control|Route|coun.ja: LangGraph Command(goto=billing_worker) は Route spec ではなく runtime RoutingDecision。

orchestration-routing-control|RoutingDec.zh: LangGraph agent_node 返回 Command(goto=tools if response.tool_calls else END) 于求值时刻选择下一节点，即一次 RoutingDecision。
orchestration-routing-control|RoutingDec.en: LangGraph agent_node returns Command(goto=tools if tool_calls else END) selecting next node at evaluation time as one RoutingDecision.
orchestration-routing-control|RoutingDec.ja: LangGraph Command(goto=tools/END) が evaluation 時 RoutingDecision。

orchestration-routing-control|RoutingPol.zh: Semantic Router RouteLayer(routes=[billing_route, technical_route, jailbreak_route]) 在 LLM 调用前用 embedding 选择 handler，对应多候选 RoutingPolicy。
orchestration-routing-control|RoutingPol.en: Semantic Router RouteLayer with billing/technical/jailbreak routes selects handler via embeddings before LLM call, matching multi-candidate RoutingPolicy.
orchestration-routing-control|RoutingPol.ja: Semantic Router RouteLayer が embedding で handler 選択。

orchestration-routing-control|BranchCond.zh: LangGraph add_conditional_edges(model, should_continue, {continue:tools, end:END}) 的 should_continue(state) 即 BranchCondition。
orchestration-routing-control|BranchCond.en: LangGraph add_conditional_edges(model, should_continue, map) where should_continue(state) is BranchCondition.

orchestration-routing-control|RetryPolic.zh: LangGraph should_retry(state) 返回 retry 或 done，映射 {retry:process, done:END}，attempts<3 时循环 process 节点。
orchestration-routing-control|RetryPolic.en: LangGraph should_retry returns retry or done mapping to {retry:process, done:END} looping process while attempts<3.
orchestration-routing-control|RetryPolic.ja: LangGraph should_retry retry map が attempts<3 で process をループ。

orchestration-routing-control|SuccessorD.zh: LangGraph dispatch 返回 [Send(worker, {item: item}) for item in state[items]] 动态派发后继节点，即 SuccessorDispatch。
orchestration-routing-control|SuccessorD.en: LangGraph dispatch returns Send list dynamically dispatching worker successors as SuccessorDispatch.
orchestration-routing-control|SuccessorD.ja: LangGraph Send list が dynamic SuccessorDispatch。

orchestration-delegation-handoff|*|posit.zh: OpenAI Handoff(transfer_to_agent) 与 A2A SendMessage 映射 orchestration-delegation-handoff 委派与交接流程。
orchestration-delegation-handoff|*|posit.en: OpenAI Handoff(transfer_to_agent) and A2A SendMessage map orchestration-delegation-handoff delegation and handoff processes.
orchestration-delegation-handoff|*|posit.ja: OpenAI Handoff + A2A SendMessage が delegation/handoff process を写像。

orchestration-delegation-handoff|Handoff.zh: OpenAI triage_agent = Agent(name=Triage, handoffs=[billing_agent, handoff(refund_agent)])；LLM 调用 transfer_to_billing_agent 完成控制转移。
orchestration-delegation-handoff|Handoff.en: OpenAI triage_agent handoffs=[billing_agent, handoff(refund_agent)]; LLM invokes transfer_to_billing_agent for control transfer.
orchestration-delegation-handoff|Handoff.ja: OpenAI triage handoffs；transfer_to_billing_agent 呼び出し。

orchestration-delegation-handoff|Respons.zh: OpenAI customer_service 示例 HandoffOutputItem 记录 Triage Agent→FAQ Agent handoff，ControlOwnership 随 target agent 转移。
orchestration-delegation-handoff|Respons.en: OpenAI customer_service HandoffOutputItem records Triage→FAQ handoff with ControlOwnership transfer to target agent.

orchestration-delegation-handoff|Delegat.zh: LangGraph supervisor 节点 Command(goto=research_worker) 委派子图，initiation→acceptance→completion 对应 DelegationProcess 阶段。
orchestration-delegation-handoff|Delegat.en: LangGraph supervisor Command(goto=research_worker) delegates subgraph through initiation/acceptance/completion as DelegationProcess.
orchestration-delegation-handoff|Delegat.ja: LangGraph supervisor Command 委派 subgraph 各 DelegationPhase。

orchestration-delegation-handoff|Subagen.zh: LangGraph 子图私有 TypedDict state 与父图仅在 entry/exit 边界交换，对应 SubagentContext 隔离。
orchestration-delegation-handoff|Subagen.en: LangGraph subgraph private TypedDict state exchanges with parent only at entry/exit boundaries as SubagentContext isolation.
orchestration-delegation-handoff|Subagen.ja: LangGraph subgraph private state isolation が SubagentContext。

orchestration-delegation-handoff|WorkerS.zh: AutoGen GroupChatManager(speaker_selection_method=auto) 用 LLM 从 agents 列表选择下一发言者，对应 WorkerSelection。
orchestration-delegation-handoff|WorkerS.en: AutoGen GroupChatManager speaker_selection_method=auto uses LLM to pick next speaker from agents list as WorkerSelection.
orchestration-delegation-handoff|WorkerS.ja: AutoGen GroupChatManager auto speaker selection が WorkerSelection。

orchestration-delegation-handoff|A2ATask.zh: A2A SendMessage 创建 Task：status.state 从 TASK_STATE_SUBMITTED→TASK_STATE_WORKING→TASK_STATE_COMPLETED，含 id、history、artifacts。
orchestration-delegation-handoff|A2ATask.en: A2A SendMessage creates Task: status.state SUBMITTED→WORKING→COMPLETED with id, history, artifacts.

orchestration-delegation-handoff|A2ATask.zh: A2A TaskState protobuf enum：TASK_STATE_SUBMITTED(1)、TASK_STATE_WORKING(2)、TASK_STATE_COMPLETED(3) 等定义任务生命周期。
orchestration-delegation-handoff|A2ATask.en: A2A TaskState protobuf enum SUBMITTED, WORKING, COMPLETED defines task lifecycle.

orchestration-delegation-handoff|A2ASend.zh: A2A SendMessageRequest {message, configuration, metadata} 发起 agent-to-agent 通信，agent 可创建 Task 或返回 Message。
orchestration-delegation-handoff|A2ASend.en: A2A SendMessageRequest with message, configuration, metadata initiates agent-to-agent communication creating Task or returning Message.

orchestration-delegation-handoff|A2AAgen.zh: A2A AgentCard 发布 agent 能力、skills、interfaces 与 securitySchemes，供客户端发现远程 Agent。
orchestration-delegation-handoff|A2AAgen.en: A2A AgentCard publishes capabilities, skills, interfaces, securitySchemes for client agent discovery.

orchestration-composition|*|positive.zh: LangGraph subgraph/Send 与 CrewAI Process.sequential/hierarchical 映射 orchestration-composition 组合编排。
orchestration-composition|*|positive.en: LangGraph subgraph/Send and CrewAI Process.sequential/hierarchical map orchestration-composition.
orchestration-composition|*|positive.ja: LangGraph subgraph/Send + CrewAI Process が composition orchestration を写像。

orchestration-composition|Parallelizatio.zh: LangGraph add_conditional_edges(plan, dispatch) 其中 dispatch 返回 [Send(worker, {item: x}) for x in items] 实现 map-reduce 并行。
orchestration-composition|Parallelizatio.en: LangGraph add_conditional_edges(plan, dispatch) with Send list per item implements map-reduce parallelization.
orchestration-composition|Parallelizatio.ja: LangGraph Send list per item が map-reduce parallelization。

orchestration-composition|PromptChain|po.zh: LangGraph builder.add_sequence([step_1, step_2, step_3]) 或链式 add_edge 连接有序 stage，对应 PromptChain。
orchestration-composition|PromptChain|po.en: LangGraph add_sequence or chained add_edge connects ordered stages as PromptChain.

orchestration-composition|ParallelBranch.zh: CrewAI Task(async_execution=True) 允许独立 task 并行执行，Process.sequential crew 内并行分支对应 ParallelBranch。
orchestration-composition|ParallelBranch.en: CrewAI Task(async_execution=True) enables parallel independent tasks within Process.sequential crew as ParallelBranch.

orchestration-composition|OrchestrationT.zh: LangGraph StateGraph 声明 START→research→writer→reviewer→END 静态拓扑，compile() 生成 CompiledStateGraph 供 invoke。
orchestration-composition|OrchestrationT.en: LangGraph StateGraph declares START→research→writer→reviewer→END static topology; compile() yields CompiledStateGraph for invoke.

orchestration-composition|Synthesis|posi.zh: CrewAI reporting_task 合并 research_task context 生成 report.md（output_file=report.md），是 Synthesis 聚合活动。
orchestration-composition|Synthesis|posi.en: CrewAI reporting_task merges research_task context into report.md output_file as Synthesis aggregation activity.
orchestration-composition|Synthesis|posi.ja: CrewAI reporting_task context merge → report.md Synthesis activity。

orchestration-composition|Voting|positiv.zh: AutoGen GroupChat(agents=[teacher, lesson_planner, lesson_reviewer], speaker_selection_method=auto) 多 agent 对 proposal 轮流发言后汇总，对应 Voting 模式。
orchestration-composition|Voting|positiv.en: AutoGen GroupChat multi-agent turns on proposal then summarizes as Voting composition pattern.
orchestration-composition|Voting|positiv.ja: AutoGen GroupChat multi-agent turns が Voting pattern。

orchestration-evaluation|*|positive.zh: LangSmith evaluate()、RAGAS metrics、OpenAI Agent Evals graders 映射 orchestration-evaluation 评估与改进循环。
orchestration-evaluation|*|positive.en: LangSmith evaluate(), RAGAS metrics, and OpenAI Agent Evals graders map orchestration-evaluation improvement loops.
orchestration-evaluation|*|positive.ja: LangSmith/RAGAS/OpenAI Agent Evals が evaluation/improvement loop を写像。

orchestration-evaluation|EvaluationActiv.zh: LangSmith ls_client.evaluate(agent, data=dataset.name, evaluators=[correct]) 对 agent 轨迹运行评估并记录 experiment。
orchestration-evaluation|EvaluationActiv.en: LangSmith ls_client.evaluate(agent, data=dataset, evaluators=[correct]) runs evaluation on agent traces recording experiment.
orchestration-evaluation|EvaluationActiv.ja: LangSmith evaluate() agent trace experiment 記録。

orchestration-evaluation|EvaluatorOptimi.zh: LangGraph evaluator→optimizer 循环：evaluator 节点评分后 conditional_edges 决定是否回到 generator 节点修订。
orchestration-evaluation|EvaluatorOptimi.en: LangGraph evaluator→optimizer loop: evaluator scores then conditional_edges routes back to generator for revision.

orchestration-evaluation|EvaluationAttem.zh: RAGAS evaluate(dataset, metrics=[Faithfulness(), LLMContextRecall()], llm=evaluator_llm) 单次评估尝试，trace 到 LangSmith。
orchestration-evaluation|EvaluationAttem.en: RAGAS evaluate with Faithfulness and LLMContextRecall as one evaluation attempt traced to LangSmith.

orchestration-evaluation|RevisionAttempt.zh: OpenAI Agent Evals：evaluator/grader 返回 fail 后 agent 根据 feedback 修订输出并重新提交，即 RevisionAttempt。
orchestration-evaluation|RevisionAttempt.en: OpenAI Agent Evals: after grader fail agent revises output from feedback and resubmits as RevisionAttempt.
orchestration-evaluation|RevisionAttempt.ja: OpenAI Agent Evals grader fail 後 revision resubmit。

orchestration-actors-delegation|*|positi.zh: OpenAI Agent(name, instructions, tools, handoffs)、CrewAI Agent(role, goal, backstory)、AutoGen AssistantAgent 映射协调角色与委派。
orchestration-actors-delegation|*|positi.en: OpenAI Agent, CrewAI Agent role/goal/backstory, and AutoGen AssistantAgent map coordination roles and delegation.
orchestration-actors-delegation|*|positi.ja: OpenAI Agent/CrewAI Agent/AutoGen AssistantAgent が coordination role/delegation を写像。

orchestration-actors-delegation|Orchestr.zh: OpenAI customer_service Triage Agent 定义 handoffs 到 FAQ/seat_booking agent，Runner.run() 协调多专家，是 Orchestrator 角色。
orchestration-actors-delegation|Orchestr.en: OpenAI customer_service Triage Agent handoffs to FAQ/seat_booking agents; Runner.run() coordinates specialists as Orchestrator.
orchestration-actors-delegation|Orchestr.ja: OpenAI Triage Agent handoffs + Runner.run() Orchestrator。

orchestration-actors-delegation|WorkerRo.zh: CrewAI Agent(role=Data Analyst, goal=Analyze data trends in the market, backstory=...) 作为 WorkerRole 执行分配 task。
orchestration-actors-delegation|WorkerRo.en: CrewAI Agent role/goal/backstory executes assigned tasks as WorkerRole.
orchestration-actors-delegation|WorkerRo.ja: CrewAI Agent role/goal/backstory WorkerRole task execution。

orchestration-actors-delegation|Subagent.zh: LangGraph 子图 worker 节点被 supervisor Command(goto=research_worker) 调用，私有 state 不泄漏父图，对应 SubagentRole。
orchestration-actors-delegation|Subagent.en: LangGraph subgraph worker invoked by supervisor Command(goto=research_worker) with private state isolated from parent as SubagentRole.
orchestration-actors-delegation|Subagent.ja: LangGraph subgraph worker supervisor Command 呼び出し SubagentRole。

orchestration-actors-delegation|ControlO.zh: OpenAI Runner 产生 HandoffOutputItem(source=Triage Agent, target=FAQ Agent) 时 ControlOwnership 转移到 target agent。
orchestration-actors-delegation|ControlO.en: OpenAI Runner HandoffOutputItem(source=Triage, target=FAQ) transfers ControlOwnership to target agent.

orchestration-plane|*|positive.zh: LangGraph StateGraph、OpenAI Agents SDK Runner、A2A SendMessage 共同构成 orchestration-plane 多 Agent 编排能力面。
orchestration-plane|*|positive.en: LangGraph StateGraph, OpenAI Agents SDK Runner, and A2A SendMessage form orchestration-plane multi-agent orchestration capability.
orchestration-plane|*|positive.ja: LangGraph/OpenAI Agents SDK/A2A が orchestration-plane capability を構成。
